creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
At first I tough this was related to the vt(4)/xorg-input-keyboard issues, but those are now gone and I can use every app normaly, urxvt and firefox, pidgin all work fine, but chromium doesn't.

This happens at least in chromium-37.0.2062.94 and chromium-37.0.2062.120_2, and its affecting both FreeBSD-10 and 11-current so the issue is most likely in just the chromium port or maybe chromium it self!
